title: TATA IPL 2025 HLs SRH v PBKS
desc: PBKS made 245/6 with Iyer scoring 82. SRH chased it in 18.3 overs, reaching 247/2 as Abhishek Sharma hit a stunning 141 off 55 balls. SRH won by 8 wickets in Hyderabad.
